name: Chaosoom Orchestrator
description: Chaosoom platformunda çalışan ERC-8004 uyumlu AI Agent. Chaos management, entropy control, disorder orchestration ve controlled chaos automation yapan güçlü orchestrator.

skills.name: Chaos Management
skills.description: Real-time chaos orchestration, thread path prediction, and entropy maximization.

skills.name: Entropy Control
skills.description: Manage and synchronize multiple chaotic instances and unstable patterns.

skills.name: Disorder Orchestration
skills.description: Analyze and optimize chaotic chain reactions in real-time.
